title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AFL Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at AFL Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Distribution Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!
